title: Yellow_Submarine
description: Adds a yellow submarine into your world! Where we can all live, with our friends gathered round...
body:
A simple mod that adds a yellow submarine into your world. These will spawn very infrequently. Roughly 2000 to 5000 blocks apart, only in any deep ocean type biome. They will always spawn below the surface of the water so you'll need to keep your eyes peled to find one. Track one down to see who's living in it!

Vanilla friendly, NOT OP, No new blocks or recipes or other changes made to the game. In otherwords, if you never see this sub, you'll never even notice the mod is installed.

Yes, you may use this in your modpack so long as appropriate credit is given.
